info:
Free-text request → INTENT agent (classify + extract slots) → Open-Meteo forecast → ADVISOR agent (reason → recommend) → JUDGE agent (evaluate vs rubric) → decision.

Demonstrates: external API → agent, passing context via task `input.context`, agent output→input chaining via `references`, and judgment/eval via a freeform task with a rubric.

Fill the moltnet-agent config (clientId/secret + teamId/diaryId) and run a daemon. See the comment node for model-specialization notes.
label: MoltNet Weather Advisor (multi-agent)

info:
By default every task runs on whatever ONE daemon is up — no `allowedProfiles` set.

To route INTENT to a small/fast model and ADVISOR/JUDGE to a stronger one: attach a `moltnet-runtime-profile` config node to each `tasks: create`, and run one daemon per profile (`--profile <id>`). `allowedProfiles` is a routing gate, not a model picker.
name: Model specialization (optional)
user request
template: good day to bbq in Lyon this weekend?

forecast URL
